EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IEnumCurve

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that allow efficient construction of sequential subcurves along a polyline or polygon.

[Guid("A478C6A8-DDAD-11D2-9F27-00C04F6BC8E8")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IEnumCurve

Properties

CurveDistance

The current distance from the start of the curve.

double CurveDistance { get; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

PartIndex

The current part index.

int PartIndex { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Segment

The segment covering the current distance of this curve iterator.

ISegment Segment { get; }

Property Value

ISegment

Examples

Sample Snippet

SegmentDistance

The distance within the current segment of the current distance of this curve iterator.

double SegmentDistance { get; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

SegmentIndex

The current segment index within the current part.

int SegmentIndex { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

StopOptions

Stop options for the distance iterator.

esriCurveIteratorEnum StopOptions { get; set; }

Property Value

esriCurveIteratorEnum

Examples

Sample Snippet

StopReason

The reason for the current position of the distance iterator.

esriCurveIteratorEnum StopReason { get; }

esriCurveIteratorEnum

Methods

Clone()

Returns a copy of this enumerator positioned at the same segment.

IEnumCurve Clone()

Returns

IEnumCurve

GetSubcurve(double, double, bool)

Extracts a portion of this curve into a new curve.

fromDistance double
toDistance double
asRatio bool

Moves iterator to a specified distance along the curve.
